Our Products

Baby Products

High-quality, tested baby products from a professional Chinese manufacturer. Each product undergoes rigorous quality control to ensure safety and compliance.

MOQ: 50

Baby Stroller - Tested to ASTM F833-23

High-performance travel stroller with one-hand fold in 2 seconds. Tested to ASTM F833-23 & EN 1888, 247+ export batches with zero return rate. Ideal for retailers targeting on-the-go families.

Lead Time: 15-25 days
ASTM F833-23 CPC Documentation EN 1888 ISO 9001
View Details
MOQ: 100

Safety Gate - Tested to EN 1930

Auto-close baby safety gate with double-locking system. Tested to EN 1930 & ASTM F1004, 189+ export batches. Extension kits available for wider openings up to 150cm. Perfect for baby-proofing specialists.

Lead Time: 15-25 days
EN 1930 CPSC CE ASTM F1004
View Details
MOQ: 80

High Chair - Tested to ASTM F404

Food-grade high chair with FDA & LFGB compliant materials. 7-position height + 3-position recline, dishwasher-safe tray. 205+ export batches, 18-month warranty. Ideal for premium baby stores.

Lead Time: 15-25 days
CPC ASTM F404 FDA EN 14988
View Details
MOQ: 60

Baby Bed Rail Safety Guard

Heightening bed rail with breathable mesh window for visibility. Adjustable length 120-200cm, fits 20-60cm mattresses. Tested to EN 1930 & ASTM F1004, 156+ export batches. Great for online marketplaces.

Lead Time: 15-25 days
EN 1930 CPSC ASTM F1004 CE
View Details
FAQs

Product Related Questions

What certifications do your baby products have?

Our baby products are tested to ASTM F833-23 (US standard for strollers), EN 1888-1:2018 (EU standard for strollers), EN 1930:2012 (EU standard for safety gates), ASTM F404-23 (US standard for high chairs). We support CPC documentation (test reports provided for US importer CPC issuance). ISO 9001:2015 certified factory. CE marking documentation available. All test reports are available upon request.

What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for your baby products?

Our MOQ varies by product: Baby Stroller - 50 units, Safety Gate - 100 units, High Chair - 80 units, Bed Rail - 60 units. For startups and first-time orders, we can negotiate lower MOQs (as low as 30 units) with a small surcharge of 10-15%. Please contact us to discuss your specific needs.

How long is the lead time for sample and mass production?

Lead times: Sample production: 3-7 days (standard products), Custom sample: 7-10 days, Mass production: 15-25 days after sample approval, Rush orders: Available with 10-15% surcharge. We provide daily production updates via WhatsApp or Email, and can share photos and videos upon request.

View all FAQs
